# Allowlist of URL hosts that may appear in SKILL.md bodies.
#
# One host per line. Exact match or subdomain match
# (e.g. `example.com` matches `example.com` and `foo.example.com`).
# Lines starting with `#` are comments. Blank lines are ignored.
#
# Checked by `scripts/check_skill_safety.py`. Any URL in a SKILL.md body
# whose host is not on this list is a CI failure — either add the host here
# deliberately, or remove the link.

# Agent Skills open standard.
agentskills.io

# Anthropic / Claude Code documentation and help.
code.claude.com
docs.claude.com
docs.anthropic.com
support.anthropic.com
support.claude.com
www.anthropic.com
anthropic.com
claude.ai

# GitHub — releases, issues, and repository links.
github.com

# Standards RepoKit's skills and docs reference.
keepachangelog.com
semver.org
www.conventionalcommits.org
conventionalcommits.org

# Microsoft Learn — PowerShell module / PSGallery references.
learn.microsoft.com
